reviews.review_msg: I found her teaching style very relaxing - super chill (although I can see how some people might find it boring in comparison) and the readings weren't bad at all. Grading is harsh but I found the feedback helpful, TA dependant though I guess? Overall I'd take her again!
the prof is chill but if your TA is Ziwei then drop this class she is such a hard marker for no reason. even if your work is perfect she will have something negative to say

dont. students expressed concern at literally EVERYONE recieving a c- for a large portion of the grade, prof + ta only said "most of you were only 1% from a c it's really not a big deal" then wouldn't even round it up or curve it. focused on minor issues like pausing lecture at every noise like door opening but won't wear a mic. feedback is useless

i never really got to know the prof since this was a blended learning course. all of her lectures were recorded but she seemed nice enough! your mark depends entirely on the TA (i only interacted with them) so make sure to ask questions during tutorial and ask for feedback. participate in tutorial! lots of reading. [spring 2022]

She seems like a nice prof but I've only ever seen her through pre-recorded lectures. Weekly homework assignments were only for completion marks so it's not hard to do well in this class. Studied so hard for the final but I did so bad lol that's probably my fault though

Professor Gilles was very disconnected from the class. The lectures consisted of Youtube videos we could easily google ourselves and the occasional video by her. Grading criteria could've been explained better. She talks VERY slow so all of her videos were watched at 2x speed. The weekly course load was light and it wasn't hard to get a good mark.

She has really interesting lectures and always encourages people to participate. The books we are covering are really great and I learned so much in this course. Overall, I enjoyed learning with her and would really suggest other people to take ENG 112 if they have a chance to.

extremely interesting lectures, made assignments relatively enjoyable, and fair marking. She doesn't mark easy but it's nice to be challenged. I would recommend this prof to anyone and would take a course with her again if the opportunity arose.
